title: 100PCS Mouse Sander Pads, 40–400 Grit Assorted Sanding Pads Sheets, 140x100mm Hook & Loop Multi-Sander Pads with 5-Hole Dust Extraction for Detail Palm Sanders
features: EXQUISITE MATERIAL: Our mouse sander pads are made of high-quality aluminum oxide abrasive, which is wear-resistant, anti-static, and has uniform particle distribution. The material is thick and stable, not easy to be damaged during polishing, and can perform well even in narrow corners and edges

PACKAGE INCLUDES: This sanding sheet assortment includes 7 grit levels from coarse to fine: 40# (10pcs), 60#/80#/120#/180#/240#/400# (15pcs each), providing a complete pack of 100 sheets. The grit value is clearly printed on the back for quick identification.

HOOK AND LOOP DESIGN: The mouse sanding pads adopt a hook and loop design, which can be quickly and easily connected to the sander, suitable for sanding and polishing, ensuring smooth and efficient sanding operations and providing excellent results on various surfaces

EFFICIENT SANDING PERFORMANCE: Multi tool sanding pads adopt a 5-hole design to help dust removal or ventilation, reduce dust and heat accumulation, and improve sanding performance; whether you are polishing, sanding, or fine surfaces, you can get reliable performance and consistent results every time
WIDE APPLICATION: Suitable for various surfaces such as wood, metal, plastic, stone, glass, wall, car paint, car polishing, etc., it is an ideal choice for many sanders and can also be used for craft
description: " The Nreosn 100PCS Mouse Sander Pads Set is an essential sanding solution for DIY users and professionals who need reliable abrasive sheets for detail sanding and surface preparation. Constructed from high-quality aluminium oxide, each pad offers excellent durability and sharp cutting performance, making it suitable for long sanding sessions without rapid wear. This set includes seven grit levels from 40# to 400#, providing a full sanding progression from heavy material removal to ultra-smooth finishing. The coarse grits handle tough stripping tasks such as removing old varnish, smoothing rough timber or cleaning metal surfaces, while the finer grits achieve a clean, polished finish ideal for painting, varnishing or detailing. Each sheet is clearly labelled on the back for easy grit identification, saving time and improving workflow when switching between sanding stages. The hook-and-loop backing allows the sheets to be attached or removed quickly, keeping productivity high during woodworking, renovation or crafting projects. With 5 dust-extraction holes, these pads are designed to maximise airflow and improve dust removal. Compatible with most 140x100mm mouse and detail sanders, the pads work seamlessly with widely used UK sander brands such as BOSCH PSM models, Makita oscillating tools, Dewalt multi-tools and many other triangular sanders. Suitable for wood, metal, plastic, rubber, leather, glass and stone, the Nreosn sanding sheets offer wide versatility for home improvement, crafting, automotive work and professional refurbishment. Whether you're restoring a cabinet, smoothing cut edges, preparing metal for painting or polishing delicate surfaces, this sanding set delivers dependable, smooth and clean results on every project. "
